title: Dataset of atomic force microscopy (correlative confocal) - Outer epidermal edges mediate cell-cell adhesion for tissue integrity in plants
author: Erguvan, Özer
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains Atomic force microscopy Quantitative Imaging (QI) data of  Arabidopsis thaliana  dark grown hypocotyls of the wild type Col-0 and the mutant  arp2-1  obtained though a correlative microscopy approach as reported in the study "Outer epidermal edges mediate cell-cell adhesion for tissue integrity in plants" ( bioRxiv link ). Data was acquired following the method described in the publication. 
 The correlative confocal dataset is available in the related repository 10.5281/zenodo.15125559 under "confocal (correlative AFM)" with a mirrored data organization.
